hard_gates.name: DFM active fee changes pool LP/CL fee growth, not only separate hook fees
hard_gates.finding: apply_dfm_fee_state writes the DFM pool swap fee into pool.lp_fee_pips; Pool.swap_exact_in uses that fee in compute_swap_step and adds LP fee deltas to fee_growth_global{0,1}_x128. The runner settles those fee-growth deltas into CL positions.

hard_gates.name: Hook fees are exported separately and not counted as CL revenue
hard_gates.finding: SwapEvent carries lp_fee_paid and hook_fee_paid separately. Exports map lp_fee_paid to LP/CL fee fields and hook_fee_paid to dfm_hook_fee_usd / dfm_hook_fees_usd.

hard_gates.name: Raw exports split CL fees into base LP fees and DFM LP fee lift, and verifier requires base + lift = total
hard_gates.finding: period_stats and trades export base_lp_fees_usd/base_lp_fee_usd plus dfm_lp_fee_lift_usd. verify_run_export checks base LP fees, DFM lift, hook fees, and base plus lift equals total LP fees.

hard_gates.name: UI highlights DFM surge and shows DFM lift in CL fee row
hard_gates.finding: UI text switches to DFM fee surge and the LP/CL fee row appends DFM lift. Existing Playwright evidence reports dfm_surge_highlight=true.

hard_gates.name: Full 180-day export recomputation passes with no mismatch
hard_gates.finding: Read-only verify_run_export rerun returned status=pass with failures=[].

hard_gates.name: Tests and Playwright evidence support the claims
hard_gates.finding: tests/test_runner.py passed 8/8, the full pytest suite passed 90/90, and existing Playwright evidence status is pass.
hard_gates.verification_scope_note: Playwright was not rerun during this review because the script overwrites UI evidence files outside the allowed artifact list.

hard_gates.name: Residual risks are accurately stated, especially exact live per-pool DFM policy calibration
hard_gates.finding: The prior report states exact live per-pool policy calibration is unavailable. This independent review agrees and keeps that as the primary residual risk.

non_blocking_risks: Exact live per-pool DFM policy parameters were not available in the reviewed materials; surge sizing/cadence remains deterministic calibration.
Playwright was not rerun during this review to avoid overwriting existing UI evidence outside the allowed artifact list.
Base market comparison relies on a point-in-time GeckoTerminal reference file, not a formal Uniswap v4 Base subgraph calibration set.
Retail child trades are exported as deterministic counts on execution swap rows, not as one row per child trade.
not_verified: Exact live target-pool DFM policy calibration.
Fresh Playwright rerun output generated during this independent review.
